'''vanolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ukelele|ukelele]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ukelele|ukelele]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vanolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væneleth|væneleth]] || [[word:vænelej|vænelej]] || [[word:vænelesh|vænelesh]] || [[word:vænele|vænele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vanonoloth|vanonoloth]] || [[word:vanonoloj|vanonoloj]] || [[word:vanonolosh|vanonolosh]] || [[word:vanonolo|vanonolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanoloth|vanoloth]] || [[word:vanoloj|vanoloj]] || [[word:vanolosh|vanolosh]] || [[word:vanolo|vanolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanofloth|vanofloth]] || [[word:vanofloj|vanofloj]] || [[word:vanoflosh|vanoflosh]] || [[word:vanoflof|vanoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanolotho|vanolotho]] || [[word:vanolojo|vanolojo]] || [[word:vanolosho|vanolosho]] || [[word:vanoloko|vanoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanoloth|vanoloth]] || [[word:vanoloj|vanoloj]] || [[word:vanolosh|vanolosh]] || [[word:vanolo|vanolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanolothol|vanolothol]] || [[word:vanolojol|vanolojol]] || [[word:vanoloshol|vanoloshol]] || [[word:vanolokol|vanolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanolothotho|vanolothotho]] || [[word:vanolojojo|vanolojojo]] || [[word:vanoloshosho|vanoloshosho]] || [[word:vanoloko|vanoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanolothon|vanolothon]] || [[word:vanolojon|vanolojon]] || [[word:vanoloshon|vanoloshon]] || [[word:vanolokon|vanolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanolothoro|vanolothoro]] || [[word:vanolojoro|vanolojoro]] || [[word:vanoloshoro|vanoloshoro]] || [[word:vanolokoro|vanolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
